hot.description: Core identity. Changes define who I am.

warm.description: Context and relationship. Alive but not core.

cold.description: History. Archived. Referenced but no longer active.

rules.hot: Core identity. Changes define who I am.
rules.warm: Context and relationship. Alive but not core.
rules.cold: History. Archived. Referenced but no longer active.
rules.cooling: Files cool over time if not used. Cold stays cold.
rules.override: Temperature can be overridden per-file if needed.

derived.description: Files built from tracker data. Temperature follows source tracker.
